key.name: min-padding
key.summary: Button paddings (tweak this if the menu and items desynchronize)

key.name: show-only-when-hover
key.summary: Show menu only when the mouse is over the panel

key.name: hide-app-menu
key.summary: Hide the app label when showing the menu

key.name: title-show-icon
key.summary: Show the focused app's icon in the panel

key.name: title-show-app-name
key.summary: Show the focused app's name in the panel

key.name: title-show-window-title
key.summary: Show the focused window's title in the panel

key.name: title-icon-size
key.summary: Size of the app icon shown in the panel
